Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Awakening]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 10''' — Awakening is the process of bringing a measure of awareness or 'life' to an object.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 15''' — Awakening is a poorly understood process used to create Soulbound and many powerful weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — Awakening is a dangerous process.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Awakening an object is a process that can take days or weeks.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 9''' — Awakening is a process the Emperor uses on gravel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — Awakening is a process that allows an object's physical nature to be changed by Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Awakening is a process that is not yet fully understood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Awakening is a permanent process that makes a blade more powerful but less predictable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — Awakening is the process of bringing an object to life through a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — An Awakening is a process where a blade can gain its own guidance if not properly managed during Reading.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — Awakening is a process used to empower objects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Awakening can grant a weapon powers it did not previously possess.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — Awakening is a phenomenon related to the powers of a Soulbound.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Awakening is a process of blending Intent from the object, its owner, and the Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 18''' — Awakening can be used to cover up imperfections in craftsmanship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 18''' — No one, except perhaps the Emperor, has ever been sure exactly how Awakening works.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — If an object is significant to both the Reader and its owner, Awakening is more likely to succeed.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — The Awakening process involves Reader-Gardener pairs entering secluded chambers.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
